biological_replicate: human adult primary erythroid progenitor cells
we used human adult primary erythroid progenitor cells from bone marrow as a further model.
experimental_design: we generated two stable NonO knockdown (NonO-KD) K562 cell lines (KD1 and KD2) using specific shRNAs and a scrambled (SCR) control.
factor_value: we utilized specific lentiviral shRNA to knock down NonO expression.
number_of_fractions: the expression level of γ-globin was significantly increased in NonO-KD cells compared with SCR cells.
number_of_biological_replicates: the text does not specify the number of donors, so we assume at least one.
number_of_samples: the number of biological replicates is 1 and the number of fractions is 1.
